summary: Pipeline List UI Polish - All 12 features verified successfully. Comprehensive Playwright testing confirmed: (1) 26px LogoBox containers with rounded corners and subtle bg, (2) On Track logos muted at opacity 0.55, (3) Shortened school names (Florida not University of Florida), (4) CTA hierarchy (HIGH=red#dc2626+bold700, MED=gray#94a3b8+600, LOW=#cbd5e1+500+opacity0.6), (5) Coming Up header opacity 0.92, (6) Green dot 5px#10b981@0.5 in On Track rows, (7-8) Hover states with pb-row:hover CSS, (9) Rows clickable cursor:pointer, (10) SwipeableCard on HIGH(5)/MED(1) rows, (11) On Track collapsible toggle, (12) Priority/Pipeline toggle buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: LogoBox component correctly implements 26px container with borderRadius:6, flexShrink:0, and subtle #f1f5f9 background
shortenName() helper correctly strips 'University of', 'University', 'College', 'Institute of Technology' patterns
PriorityRowStyles injects hover CSS with .pb-row:hover and .pb-row:hover .pb-cta opacity rules
HighRow CTA: color #dc2626, fontWeight 700, opacity 0.8 - correctly red+bold
MedRow CTA: color var(--cm-text-3), fontWeight 600, opacity 0.7 - correctly gray+medium
LowRow CTA: color var(--cm-text-4), fontWeight 500, opacity 0.6 - correctly muted
Green dot in LowRow: 5px width/height, borderRadius 50%, background #10b981, opacity 0.5
SectionHeader receives opacity prop - Coming Up uses opacity={0.92}
All rows use consistent padding '11px 4px' and gap:10 for alignment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline list UI polish complete. LogoBox 26px with subtle bg, shortenName strips prefixes/suffixes, CTA hierarchy by attention level, hover states via injected CSS (.pb-row, .pb-cta classes). Current data: 5 HIGH (Florida, Emory, Stanford, UCLA, TEST_Dup), 1 MED (Florida Atlantic), 1 LOW (Creighton). Toggle buttons: data-testid='toggle-priority' and 'toggle-pipeline'. On Track section collapsible via header click.

verified_features.1_logo_26px_containers: PASS - LogoBox 26x26px with borderRadius:6 and #f1f5f9 background
verified_features.2_on_track_logo_muted: PASS - On Track LogoBox has opacity: 0.55
verified_features.4_cta_hierarchy_high: PASS - HIGH rows: color #dc2626 (red), fontWeight 700 (bold), opacity 0.8
verified_features.4_cta_hierarchy_med: PASS - MED rows: color #94a3b8 (gray), fontWeight 600 (medium), opacity 0.7
verified_features.4_cta_hierarchy_low: PASS - LOW rows: color #cbd5e1 (muted), fontWeight 500, opacity 0.6
verified_features.5_coming_up_header_opacity: PASS - Coming Up header has opacity 0.92
verified_features.9_rows_clickable: PASS - All rows have cursor: pointer
verified_features.10_swipe_gestures: PASS - SwipeableCard wraps HIGH (5) and MED (1) rows
verified_features.11_on_track_collapsible: PASS - Header toggle expands/collapses On Track section
verified_features.12_priority_pipeline_toggle: PASS - Toggle buttons switch views (data-testid: toggle-priority, toggle-pipeline)
